scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run copy-public
scripts.copy-public: rm -rf public/assets && cp -r dist/assets public/ && cp dist/sales.html public/sales.html && cp dist/cdn.html public/cdn.html && cp -f dist/favicon.svg public/favicon.svg 2>/dev/null; cp -f dist/icons.svg public/icons.svg 2>/dev/null; true
